title: June 23
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 23''' is the 174th day of the year (175th in leap years), with 191 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s#1947|1947]] – [[Kenneth C. Flint]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Walt Disney Studios Motion Pictures]] is founded as Buena Vista Film Distribution Company, Inc.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Bill Motz]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Joel Edgerton]] is born.
*[[1992]] – [[Dark Empire 4|''Dark Empire'' 4]] published.
*1996 – [[Wikipedia:Nintendo 64|Nintendo 64]] is launched.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Insider's Guide]]'' published.
*1999 – [[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' published.
*[[2011]] – [[Gene Colan]] dies.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars Art: A Poster Collection]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[The Lost Treasure of Cloud City]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2020]] – ''[[Shadow Fall: An Alphabet Squadron Novel]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars Adventures, Volume 9: Fight The Empire!]]'' published.
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Book of Lists]]'' published in the United States.
*2020 – [[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']] re-released for the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 4|PlayStation 4]] and the [[Wikipedia:Nintendo Switch|Nintendo Switch]].
*2020 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: Traveler's Guide to Batuu]]'' published digitally.
*[[2021]] – [[Darth Vader (2020) 13|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 13]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2020) 5|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2020) 5]] published.
*2021 – [[Star Wars Insider 203|''Star Wars Insider'' 203]] published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures: Galactic Training]]'' is released on [[Wikipedia:DisneyNow|DisneyNow]].
<noinclude>
